subcodes.title: Words spoken at home of Alexander Graham Bell in Washington, 1912-04-24
subcodes.first_line: Yes, most of the great inventions were made in a similar way. For instance, the search for alchemy has brought into being thousands of useful medicines and the desire of finding a direct route to India from Europe became the cause of the discovery of America
subcodes.first_line_orig: اکثر صنایع مهمه از همین راه اختراع شده مانند طالب کیمیا که سبب ظهور هزارها ادویه مفیده گشته
subcodes.subjects: @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @alchemy; the elixir, @health and healing; material and spiritual healing
